Veneers Cover Dental Imperfections Flawlessly

A veneer is a perfectly fitted to your teeth to mask flaws. Each veneer is custom crafted to perfectly suit every individual tooth. Veneers are made up of a very thin, but extremely durable layer of porcelain that is placed on top of the tooth to cover up imperfections and flaws.

Veneers can correct many different issues, here are a few:

  • Cracks in teeth
  • Chips in teeth
  • Broken teeth
  • Gaps between teeth
  • Worn-down teeth
  • Crooked teeth

Veneers can straighten your smile while making it brighter, whiter, and beautiful.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” Are Veneers the Right Choice for You?

If you have a less than confident smile, veneers could be the perfect choice for transforming your smile. With your trusted dentist in Clemson, SC, the process is quick, easy, and pain-free. They also come with many advantages.

  • Stain resistant, including hard to remove stains like coffee, wine, tea, or even smoking.
  • Very durable.
  • Easy to care for and maintain.
  • Personally designed to match your teeth. Veneers can whiten your teeth and also change the size, shape, and alignment of your teeth.
  • Closely mimic the natural look, feel, and strength of natural teeth.
  • One of the gentlest restoration options for your gums.
  • Easily replaced or repaired if a veneer is damaged.
  • Cost efficient and effective.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row]
